metadata.description: Markov Hedge Fund Method — companion Claude Code skill for video 1 of the Quant Series. Framework by Roan (@RohOnChain).

plugins.name: markov-hedge-fund-method
plugins.description: Markov regime detection for any asset. Labels Bull/Bear/Sideways, builds the MLE transition matrix, forecasts n-step ahead, solves the stationary distribution, and runs a no-lookahead walk-forward backtest. Optional Hidden Markov Model upgrade.
